Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - NamedType Cent1Lbl
lt-LT=" #1 ct. "
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - NamedType Cent2Lbl
lt-LT="Esama suma %1 didesnė nei 1 000 000 000 000"
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - NamedType CurrentAmountIsGreaterThanLbl

trans-unit.source: Debt reconcilation statement %1 has no lines
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Skolos derinimo aktas %1 neturi eilučių"
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - NamedType DebtReconciliationLinesErr
lt-LT="Skolos derinimo aktas %1 jau yra išrašytas"
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - NamedType DebtReconciliationStatementErr
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - Method getEnglishDate - NamedType dateFormatLbl
lt-LT="Sausis, Vasaris, Kovas, Balandis, Gegužė, Birželis, Liepa, Rugpjūtis, Rugsėjis, Spalis, Lapkritis, Gruodis"
Codeunit EVK ReconsilStatement - Method getEnglishDate - NamedType monthListLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies additional text for the statement.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo papildomą tekstą akto"

trans-unit.source: Specifies report selection usage for debt reconsi statement.

trans-unit.source: Specifies where to send the statement.

trans-unit.source: Prepare to send the document by email. The Send Email window opens prefilled for the customer where you can add or change information before you send the email.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Pasiruošimas siųsti dokumentą el. paštu. Atsidaro langas Siųsti el. paštu, kuris yra iš anksto užpildytas pirkėjo informacija, kur galite pridėti arba изменить информацию перед отправкой электронной почты."
Page EVK Issued Reconcil. Statement - Action Send by &Email - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Siųsti el. paštu"

trans-unit.source: Prepare to send the document by email. The Send Email window opens prefilled for the customer where you can add or change information before you send the email.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Pasiruoškite išsiųsti dokumentą el. paštu. Išsiverčia el. pašto langas, iš anksto užpildytas klientui, kuriam galite pridėti ar pakeisti informaciją prieš išsiunčiant el. laišką."

trans-unit.source: Post the specified debt reconcilation statement.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Įrašykite nurodytą skolų suderinimo aktą"
Page EVK Reconcil Statement - Action Issue - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Išduoti"
Page EVK Reconcil Statement - Action Issue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View a test report so that you can find and correct any errors before you perform the actual posting of the journal or document.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Peržiūrėti testinį ataskaitą, kad galėtumėte rasti ir pataisyti bet kokius klaidas prieš atliekant tikrąjį žurnalo ar dokumento įrašymą"

trans-unit.source: View a test report so that you can find and correct any errors before you perform the actual posting of the journal or document.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Peržiūrėti testinį ataskaitą, kad galėtumėte rasti ir pataisyti bet kokius klaidas prieš atliekant tikrąjį žurnalo ar dokumento įrašymą"

Page EVK Reconsil Statement List - Action ShowReconcilationStatementReport - Property Caption
lt-LT="Ataskaitos pasirinkimas - skolų suderinimo aktas"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the email body layout that is used.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo el. laiško kūno išdėstymo ID, kuris naudojamas"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Email Body Layout Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the email body layout that is used.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo el. laiško kūno išdėstymo aprašymą"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Email Body Layout Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the display name of the report.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo ataskaitos rodymo pavadinimą"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Report Caption - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the object ID of the report.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo ataskaitos objekto ID"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Report ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a number that indicates where this report is in the printing order.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo skaičių, kuris nurodo, kur ši ataskaita yra spausdinimo tvarkoje"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Sequence - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether to attach the related document to the email.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, ar prisegtį susijusį dokumentą prie el. laiško"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Use for Email Attachment - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether to insert summarized information, such as invoice number, due date in the body of the email that you send.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, ar įterpti suvestines informacijos, tokios kaip sąskaitos faktūros numeris, terminas el. laiške, kurį siunčiate"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control Use for Email Body - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies which type of document the report is used for.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, kokio tipo dokumentui naudojama ataskaita"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control ReportUsage2 - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Naudojimas"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control ReportUsage2 - Property Caption
lt-LT="Skolų suderinimo aktas"
Page EVK ReportSelectionDebtRecStat - Control ReportUsage2 - Property OptionCaption
lt-LT="Visi objektai"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Property Caption
lt-LT="Bendras"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the class of the field.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo lauko klasę"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control Class - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the field.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo lauko pavadinimą"

trans-unit.source: Specifies the length of the field.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo lauko ilgį"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control Len - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the field.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo lauko numerį"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the table.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo lentelės pavadinimą"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control TableName - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the source table number, if any, for this Codeunit.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo šaltinio lentelės numerį, jei toks yra, šiai codeunitės"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control TableNo - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the data type of the selected field.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo pasirinkto lauko duomenų tipą"
Page EVK RSAllObj - Control Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Please confirm that the below indicated sum is our company

Report EVK Debt Reconcile Stat. - NamedType RemainingAmountLbl

trans-unit.source: Since we have not received any debt confirmation protocol from you, the sum indicated in the protocol shall be considered to be the right one.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nes musų nereikia gauti jokio skolos patvirtinimo protokolo iš jūsų, protokole nurodyta suma bus laikoma teisinga."
Report EVK Debt Reconcile Stat. - NamedType SinceWeHaveNotReceivedDebtConfirmationLbl

trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Prašome patvirtinti, kad žemiau nurodyta suma yra teisinga"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType PleaseConfirmLbl

trans-unit.source: Please confirm that the below indicated sum is our company
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Prašome patvirtinti, kad žemiau nurodyta suma yra teisinga"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType PleaseConfirmVendorLbl
lt-LT="Liko (EUR)"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType RemainingAmountLbl

trans-unit.source: Since we have not received any debt confirmation protocol from you, the sum indicated in the protocol shall be considered to be the right one.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nes mus nebuvo pateikta jokia skolos patvirtinimo protokolo, protokole nurodyta suma bus laikoma teisinga."
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType SinceWeHaveNotReceivedDebtConfirmationLbl
lt-LT="Jūsų nurodyta skolos suma"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType SpecifiedDebtAmountLbl
lt-LT="Jūsų nurodyta permokėta suma"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType SpecifiedOverpayedAmountLbl
lt-LT="Pradžios data"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType StartDateLbl
lt-LT=" į mūsų kompaniją "
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType ToOurCompanyLbl
lt-LT="Iš viso:"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType TotalLbl
lt-LT=" į jūsų kompaniją "
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - NamedType ToYourCompanyLbl
lt-LT="Bendra informacija"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indicates that only debt entries will be printed.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, kad bus spausdinami tik skolų įrašai"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - Control OnlyDebts - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Rodyti tik skolų įrašus"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - Control OnlyDebts - Property Caption
lt-LT="Nurodo, kaip spausdinti eilutes"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - Control PrintDtls - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Spausdinti detales"
Report EVK Issued Debt Recon. Stat. - Control PrintDtls - Property Caption
lt-LT="Išrašyti skolų suderinimo ataskaitą"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Property Caption
lt-LT="Parinktys"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies it you want to print or email the reminders when they are issued.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, ar norite spausdinti ar siųsti el. paštu priminimus, kai jie yra išrašomi"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control EVKPrintDoc - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Spausdinti"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control EVKPrintDoc - Property Caption
lt-LT=" ,Spausdinti,Siųsti el. paštu"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control EVKPrintDoc - Property OptionCaption

trans-unit.source: Specifies if you want to hide email dialog.
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Nurodo, ar norite slėpti el. pašto dialogą"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control HideEmailDialog - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Slėpti el. pašto dialogą"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control HideEmailDialog - Property Caption
lt-LT="Nurodo, kaip spausdinti eilutes"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control PrintDtls - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Spausdinti išsamią informaciją"
Report EVK IssueDebtReconcileStat - Control PrintDtls - Property Caption
lt-LT="Nurodo šablono kalbą"
PageExtension EVK Custom Report Layouts - Control EVK Language Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Do you want to delete company stamp?
trans-unit.note: lt-LT="Ar norite ištrinti kompanijos antspaudą?"
PageExtension EVK EmployeeCard - NamedType ConfirmDeletePictureLbl
lt-LT="Ištrina darbuotojo parašą"
PageExtension EVK EmployeeCard - Action EVK DELETEEmployeesignature - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Ištrinti darbuotojo parašą"
PageExtension EVK EmployeeCard - Action EVK DELETEEmployeesignature - Property Caption
lt-LT="Nurodo darbuotojo parašą"
PageExtension EVK EmployeeCard - Control EVK Employee Signature - Property ToolTip
lt-LT="Kalbos kodas"
TableExtension EVK Custom Report Layout - Field EVK Language Code - Property Caption
lt-LT="Data FILTRAS (Skolų suderinimas)"
TableExtension EVK Customer - Field EVK DEBDATEFILTER - Property Caption
lt-LT="Likutis datą"
TableExtension EVK Customer - Field EVK DEBTBALANCE - Property Caption
lt-LT="Darbuotojo parašas"
TableExtension EVK Employee - Field EVK Employee Signature - Property Caption
lt-LT="Data FILTRAS (Skolų suderinimas)"
TableExtension EVK Vendor - Field EVK DEBDATEFILTER - Property Caption
lt-LT="Likutis datą"
TableExtension EVK Vendor - Field EVK DEBTBALANCE - Property Caption
lt-LT="Suderinimo akto el. pašto scenarijus"
EnumExtension EVK EmailScenario - EnumValue EVK DEBTRECONCILATIONSTATEMENT - Property Caption
lt-LT="Suderinimo akto ataskaitos pasirinkimo naudojimas"
EnumExtension EVK ReportSelectionUsage - EnumValue EVK DEBTRECONCILATIONSTATEMENT - Property Caption
